segments.text: Sing to the Lord a new song; sing to the Lord, all the earth.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Sing to the Lord, praise his name; proclaim his salvation day after day.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Declare his glory among the nations, his marvelous deeds among all peoples.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For great is the Lord and most worthy of praise; he is to be feared above all gods.
For all the gods of the nations are idols, but the Lord made the heavens.
Splendor and majesty are before him; strength and glory are in his sanctuary.
Ascribe to the Lord, all you families of nations, ascribe to the Lord glory and strength.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Ascribe to the Lord the glory due his name; bring an offering and come into his courts.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Worship the Lord in the splendor of his holiness; tremble before him, all the earth.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Say among the nations, 'The Lord reigns.' The world is firmly established, it cannot be moved; he will judge the peoples with equity.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the heavens rejoice, let the earth be glad; let the sea resound, and all that is in it.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the fields be jubilant, and everything in them; let all the trees of the forest sing for joy.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let all creation rejoice before the Lord, for he comes, he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world in righteousness and the peoples in his faithfulness.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
